title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
summary: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
whyItMatters: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”
